response.text: {"action": "final", "output": "TRADEOFF-ANALYSIS: GitHub stars — qdrant 24000 > chroma 21000 > weaviate 13000. Qdrant leads on community traction and filtered-search performance (Rust); Chroma is the easiest to embed in a Python app (Apache-2.0); Weaviate bundles hybrid search out of the box (BSD-3-Clause)."}
